mnemonics.title: Multiprocessor Advantages
mnemonics.content: **TER** - Throughput, Economy, Reliability. The three key benefits of multiprocessor systems.

mnemonics.title: SMP vs AMP
mnemonics.content: **S**MP = **S**ame status (peers), **A**MP = **A**ssigner (master-slave). SMP processors are equals; AMP has a boss processor.

mnemonics.title: Clustering Types
mnemonics.content: **A**symmetric = **A**ctive + standby (one idle), **S**ymmetric = **S**hared work (all active). Symmetric is more efficient.

mnemonics.title: Graceful Degradation
mnemonics.content: Think 'Graceful = Gradual'. The system does not crash suddenly; it gradually reduces performance as components fail, like a car losing one cylinder but still running.
